overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The player walks along sidewalks, passes through a covered walkway, and crosses a busy intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic billboards and metal infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past metal support pillars and illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
person in blue hat and tank top crossing the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: large white billboard displaying NicoLA text with a beverage can image
tall dark vertical metal columns lining the edge of the sidewalk
orange and white striped traffic barriers along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit futuristic city sidewalk at night, passing metal support pillars and a large NicoLA billboard. A pedestrian walks ahead in the distance while another person crosses the path up close. Sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under metal truss overhang

events.description: enters covered walkway with overhead metal roof structure and orange neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered section of sidewalk beneath the metal truss structure

entered.detail: large bright orange neon sign reading CALIENTE mounted on the building wall
metal truss roof covering the walkway creating a sheltered corridor
series of illuminated digital advertisements mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway beneath a metal truss roof. An orange CALIENTE neon sign glows on the left wall alongside digital screens. The space feels more enclosed with the overhead structure blocking the sky, and no other pedestrians are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with continuous digital billboard walls

events.description: exits covered walkway back to open street with visible sky between towering buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching a large intersection with increasing density of neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing visible in the distance near the intersection

entered.detail: large turquoise billboard with MILFGUARD text and stylized female figure
skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising high above the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens back to the neon-lit street with towering glass skyscrapers ahead. A large Milfguard billboard dominates the left wall while various other advertisements line the street. The camera approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic

events.description: reaches the intersection and begins crossing the multi-lane street
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection from left and right while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing traffic and looking around at the surrounding cityscape

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
dark colored sports car passing through the cross street

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt road
traffic signals showing green for vehicles at the cross street

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the wide intersection and steps onto the yellow crosswalk markings. Vehicles pass through the intersection from both directions as the camera crosses the road. The surrounding area features massive digital billboards and illuminated skyscrapers on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, neon-lit city sidewalk into the confined space of a covered urban walkway. It begins by gliding past metal support pillars and a towering NicoLA billboard, weaving through a few pedestrians while sparse traffic flows along the adjacent multi-lane road. As the camera advances, the open night sky is gradually obscured as the path leads beneath a heavy metal truss roof. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed atmosphere, where the surrounding city noise fades and the environment is dominated by the orange glow of a CALIENTE neon sign and flickering digital screens along the walls.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the confines of a covered walkway into the expansive, neon-drenched scale of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by exiting the shelter and emerging onto a street lined with towering glass skyscrapers, where a massive Milfguard billboard and various advertisements dominate the left side of the view. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts toward a yellow-striped crosswalk that marks the edge of a wide junction. The scene then opens further as the camera steps onto the road, moving through the flow of passing vehicles while surrounded by illuminated skyscrapers and colossal digital billboards on all sides.
